items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明因美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问，相对此前的公告无新增技术细节。影响范围涵盖所有使用上述 model 字段的调用，需立即切换到未受管制的 Claude 系列模型。
items.backend_focus: 立刻行动：在所有 API 调用中把 model="fable-5"/"mythos-5" 替换为 claude-opus-4-8 或 claude-sonnet-4.x；移除本地任何针对 Fable/Mythos 的 prompt 缓存与微调工件。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Introducing Claude Tag，定位为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式，属于产品/协作形态公告。公告原文未展开 API 字段、SDK 或定价细节，目前缺少可落地的接口层面信息，对工程集成的影响待后续文档补齐。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动。等待 Anthropic 文档补全 Claude Tag 的 API 形态（是否为新 endpoint、是否影响 messages 接口）；上线前不要在生产路径中调用未公开字段。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级版本，重点强化 coding、agentic tasks 与专业工作能力。相对 Opus 4.5 在编码与 agent 长链路任务上更强，并配套相应安全机制；模型通过 messages API 按 model="claude-opus-4-8" 调用，旧版本未下线。
items.backend_focus: 建议：在 staging 环境用 coding/agent benchmark 跑 Opus 4.8 与 Opus 4.5 对比；通过 Anthropic SDK 升级到最新版本（anthropic-sdk-python >= 当前支持 4.8 的版本），将 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8 再灰度上线。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态多项合作，意味着 Claude 在韩国的区域可用性、本地合规与数据驻留支持将增强。这是区域扩张与渠道公告，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或全球定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 如服务面向韩国用户，可在控制台确认账号是否启用 KR 区域；其余团队无需任何代码改动。
